meta.sourceName: Ohio Checkbook / Office of Budget and Management
meta.transformationNotes: Revenue sourced from Ohio OBM General Revenue Fund monthly collection report. Expenditure sourced from Ohio Checkbook (OAKS data) aggregated by agency. Revenue categories follow OBM Monthly Financial Report table headings. Expenditure rows are agency-level totals; intra-governmental transfers excluded. Amounts in whole dollars; federal reimbursements included in relevant agency lines.
